sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56915" key="kerou=xos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κεροῦχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἔχω</etym>) <sense id="n56915.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">horned</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">αἴξ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:45:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45.5</biblScope></bibl></cit>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n56915.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κ.</foreign> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κάλως</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">brace of the yard-arm</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δελφινοφόρος κ.</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
